name: aigest
description: Default file-reading tool for Claude Code. Delegates codebase reads (orientation, analysis, architecture summaries, per-folder briefings, config inventories, JSONL transcript extraction) to a cheap worker model over an OpenAI-compatible API. Prefer `aigest ask` over the built-in Read tool for any file or codebase reading task. Includes a lazy-install shim that fetches the aigest binary from GitHub Releases on first call.
